name: Savic: - Rolly Giant Wheel for Small Pets Like - Hamster, Guinea Pig, Mice, Mouse, and Gerbil | Can be Mounted on Cage Wire | Transparent Activity Ball, Safe to Use and Easy to Clean -19 cm
description: Give your pet the mental stimulation it needs with our Rolly Giant exercise wheel. An exercise wheel helps your pets burn off energy, utilizing their natural instinct to run. Our rolly wheel has a closed running surface and back wall which provides security and protection. We recommend you check your wheel regularly for signs of nibbling and other damage, in order to avoid injury to your pet. To ensure the wheel keeps turning easily we recommend occasional treatment with cooking oil. THE JUMBO ONE: Give your pet the stimulation it needs with the Savic Giant exercise wheel.
